_info: Raw API responses — overwritten on each new analysis

vision_raw.caption: a logo with blue and white letters

dense_captions.text: a logo with blue and white letters
a white letter in a blue circle

llm_raw.summary: The ZONNIC logo is present and the C halo is correctly placed and shaped, but the halo is a solid single colour (secondary light mint) on a white background, which violates the requirement for a visible gradient using both primary and secondary colours. Regulatory elements (nicotine warning, 18+ icon, risk communication) are missing. The logo text is navy blue and the font appears correct. Manual review is needed for regulatory compliance and halo colour/gradient.

checks_performed.detail: No nicotine warning statement is visible at the top of the image. Both English and French warnings are missing.
No 18+ age restriction icon is visible anywhere in the image.
No risk communication text is visible at the bottom of the image.
The ZONNIC logo is clearly visible in the image, with navy blue text and a halo around the C.
The ZONNIC text is navy blue (#242c65) on a white background, which is correct.
The C has a circular halo, but the halo is a solid mint colour (secondary) on a white background. It should be a gradient using both primary and secondary colours.
The logo is not altered, stacked, or distorted. No gradients in the text, no outlines, and no modification of layout.
The background is solid white, not a gradient or image.
No gradient background is present, so gradient direction and split rules do not apply.
This appears to be a flavour-led asset, but the background is solid white instead of a primary colour or gradient.
Only approved brand colours are used: navy blue for text and mint (secondary) for the halo.
The logo text appears to use the correct Santral font and weight. No NRT lockup text is present.
No grey gradient background is used in this image.
The logo has clear space around it; no elements intrude into the safety zone.
The halo is a solid colour on a white background, which is not allowed. The background is not flavour-compliant.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include a bilingual nicotine warning statement banner at the TOP of the creative.
violations.issue: No nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add a bilingual nicotine warning banner at the top of the creative.
violations.evidence: No warning text visible at the top.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.issue: No 18+ age restriction icon is present.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the 18+ icon at the bottom of the creative.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include risk communication text at the BOTTOM of the creative.
violations.issue: No risk communication text is present at the bottom.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required risk communication text at the bottom.
violations.evidence: No text visible at the bottom.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning banner must be positioned at the TOP of the asset. The risk communication and 18+ icon must be at the BOTTOM.
violations.issue: Required regulatory elements are missing from the top and bottom.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add nicotine warning at the top, risk communication and 18+ icon at the bottom.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning must appear in BOTH English and French on every asset.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add both English and French warning statements.

violations.rule_text: On a white or grey gradient background, the C halo must always use the full gradient, consisting of both the primary and secondary colours.
violations.issue: The C halo is a solid mint colour (secondary) on a white background, not a gradient using both primary and secondary colours.
violations.fix_suggestion: Change the C halo to a visible gradient blending both primary and secondary colours.
violations.evidence: Halo is solid mint, not a gradient.

violations.rule_text: Don't use a solid white background for flavour-led visuals. It should be a primary colour (1) or gradient (1 & 2).
violations.issue: Solid white background is used for a flavour-led visual.
violations.fix_suggestion: Use a primary colour or gradient background for flavour-led assets.

violations.rule_text: Don't lose the C halo (logo without any halo on the C).
violations.issue: Not violated; C halo is present.

violations.rule_text: Don't add an outline over a coloured halo.
violations.issue: Not violated; no outline over the halo.

violations.rule_text: Don't lose the halo over the background colour (halo blends into background).
violations.issue: Not violated; halo is visible against the white background.

violations.rule_text: Don't outline other letters in the logo (only C gets the halo).
violations.issue: Not violated; only C has a halo.
